name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution Via Register-cimprovider.exe
notes:
This Building Block detects using register-cimprovider.exe to execute arbitrary dll file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ivan Dyachkov, Yulia Fomina, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: DLL Execution Via Register-cimprovider.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects using register-cimprovider.exe to execute arbitrary dll file.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution Via Register-cimprovider.exe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of register-cimprovider.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-path%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dll%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: DLL Execution Via Register-cimprovider.exe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of register-cimprovider.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-path%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dll%' AQL filter query
